title: Angels, demons and centuries of UFO questions
description: For centuries, stargazers of many kinds have debated the meaning of unidentified objects in the heavens and encounters with mysterious beings on earth.

title: Ex-Pentagon UFO Investigator Says Recently Released Files Undermine NASA’s Established Narratives
description: Luis Elizondo, a former investigator for the Department of Defense UFO program, says some of the newly released files contradict what NASA has been saying for years. Earlier this month, the Pentagon released dozens of UFO files. title: UFO files: 13 fighter jets chased flying object, star-shaped entity seen
description: More than 300 pages of intelligence reports from the National Security Agency have shed new light on UFO sightings.

title: Why Government UFO Disclosure is the Ultimate Spiritual Deception
description: For decades, the official government position on UFOs was simple, straightforward, and entirely unconvincing.
